# em.m_step_Q { #tspaint.em.m_step_Q }

```python
tspaint.em.m_step_Q(S_dwell, S_jumps)
```

Closed-form generator MLE from expected dwell times and jump counts.

``q_mn = S_jumps[m, n] / S_dwell[m]`` for ``m != n``, with
``q_mm = -Σ_n q_mn`` (CLAUDE.md §3.4).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**S_dwell**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K,) array_like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Total expected dwell time per state (span-weighted).

<code>[**S_jumps**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K, K) array_like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Total expected ``m -> n`` jump counts per ordered pair (span-weighted).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K, K) numpy.ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The fitted generator ``Q`` (rows sum to 0).
